questions.text: Why did the Giant build a wall around his garden?
questions.explanation: The selfish Giant built a wall to prevent children from playing in his beautiful garden.

questions.text: Spring returned to the Giant's garden when he became kind.
questions.explanation: When the Giant became kind and allowed children to play, spring returned to his garden.

questions.text: What lesson does the story teach?
questions.correctAnswer: Sharing and kindness bring happiness, while selfishness brings sorrow.
questions.explanation: The story teaches that sharing joy with others brings true happiness.

questions.text: The little boy was actually ________ in disguise.
questions.explanation: The little boy revealed himself as Christ, showing the Giant the rewards of kindness.
